description: Perform a conflict of interest check for a new complaint using the Case Number found in /home/ga/task_data.txt. Identify the subject from the case description in the ArkCase Complaints module and verify their status in the People module. If the subject's email ends in '@arkcase.com' or '@agency.gov', update the Case Priority to 'High' and add a note stating 'Internal Affairs: Subject is a verified employee.'
